message:
🐛 Fix PR monitor: always remove WIP label & mark ready

- Run every minute with 2 checks staggered by 30s
- Always remove do-not-merge/work-in-progress label
- Always mark draft PRs ready for review
- Previously these were only done when title had [WIP]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
